name: employee-handbook-qa
description: Employee Handbook Q&A — RAG (Chroma + OpenAI) + LangGraph + MCP demo

scripts.dev: concurrently -n rag,client -c green,blue "node scripts/uvicorn-rag.cjs" "wait-on -t 120000 tcp:127.0.0.1:3001 && npm run dev -w client"
scripts.build: npm run build -w shared && npm run build -w client
scripts.test: npm run test -w shared && npm run test -w client && node scripts/pytest-rag.cjs
scripts.test:js: npm run test -w shared && npm run test -w client
